Many illustrations including plans of St. Paul?s Cathedral, Westminster, Carlton Palace, Bank of England, Church of St. George in the East, Church of St. Luke?s, St. Pancrass Church, Somerset House, College of Physicians, Covent Garden theatre, Old London Bridge, Westminster Bridge, and Waterloo Bridge. One map.
